site.name: Wizard Alchemy Guide
site.description: An independent Wizard Alchemy Roblox guide focused on source-checked codes, update notes, beginner guidance, and safe research boundaries.

game.name: Wizard Alchemy
game.descriptionSummary: Wizard Alchemy is a Roblox wizard RPG by Muggle Academy where players collect ingredients, brew potions, unlock spells, upgrade power, and explore magical areas.
game.codeSystemSignal: The Roblox game description mentions RELEASE and WIZARD as launch reward codes, but this site has not completed an in-game redemption test.

codes.officialStatus: Roblox description mentions RELEASE and WIZARD; in-game testing is still pending.
codes.verificationPolicy: Do not invent codes, rewards, or redemption steps. Promote a code to fully verified only after official-source review and in-game redemption testing.
codes.hasRedeemSystem: mentioned by official Roblox description, not yet in-game tested by this site
codes.thirdPartyConflictSummary: Third-party sites mention extra details such as race reroll quantities and MACHI, but this first version only treats Roblox-page-mentioned codes as source-backed leads.

redeemGuide.note: The Roblox description says to use RELEASE and WIZARD for free launch rewards, but this site has not verified the in-game redemption UI yet.

verificationChecklist: Use the Roblox game page as the primary source.
Check the Muggle Academy Roblox community for developer-linked sources.
Run an in-game redemption test before moving a code from pending to verified active.
Record source, date, reward text, and result for every code change.
codes.screenshotPlaceholder: No screenshot proof has been added.
codes.whyOtherSitesShowCodes: Other sites may mix official-page mentions, in-game testing, and community reports. This guide separates those evidence levels.

pages.title: Wizard Alchemy Guide | Roblox Codes, Updates & Beginner Tips
pages.description: Independent Wizard Alchemy Roblox guide with source-checked codes, update notes, beginner guidance, and safe research boundaries.
pages.lede: A source-aware Wizard Alchemy guide for Roblox players. Start with the official game page, track codes carefully, and keep unverified claims separate from facts.

faq.q: Is this an official Wizard Alchemy website?
faq.a: No. This is an independent fan guide and is not affiliated with Roblox Corporation or Muggle Academy.

faq.q: Does this guide publish untested codes?
faq.a: No. Codes are separated by evidence level. Roblox-page-mentioned codes are not treated as fully in-game tested until redemption is checked.
